Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0800 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Elektraglide.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0400 lda #$3d sta $01 jsr $ce80 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Elektraglide.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $CE80 to turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and ack any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to run correctly.
